content.en:
"Ancestral Monument Space, maybe I will have a chance to enter this time!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he must thoroughly comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram and become a personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, so that he can have the opportunity to obtain the space-time chaotic supernatural powers, once he has practiced the space-time chaotic supernatural powers, and then condenses the prototype of the space-time avenue, his strength will inevitably skyrocket, and he will even have the opportunity to enter the top 100 of the god generals list.

Of course, it's just a chance, and the difficulty is still skyrocketing!

Gathering his thoughts, Ye Tian began to comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram with all his might.

After 4319.

Ye Tian finally comprehended the Void Heaven Diagram thoroughly.

At the moment when the Void Heaven Diagram was comprehended, an illusory Void Heaven Diagram appeared above Ye Tian's head.

......

Chaos, the Void Realm.

This is an ancestral realm created by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and it is also the headquarters of the Void Heaven Sect.

Void Heaven Realm, in the Void Heaven Temple.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was preaching to some of his own disciples, and suddenly his gaze passed through countless spaces and looked at Ye Tian in the great universe.

He seemed to feel something, and smiled slightly: "You have one more junior brother!"

"Congratulations, Master!"

"Congratulations, Master!"

"Congratulations, Master!"

A group of personal disciples congratulated.

They knew that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was not talking about a formal disciple, but a personal disciple.

Ordinary disciples are not qualified to be their junior disciples, only personal disciples are qualified.

Obviously, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, who has not accepted a personal disciple for countless years, is going to accept another personal disciple again.

Wow!

A wisp of consciousness of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor crossed the infinite void, and soon came to the outside of the great universe, and then instantly entered the interior of the great universe.

As long as this wisp of his consciousness does not exert power and does not affect any living beings in the great universe, nothing will happen.

The Great Universe, the Void Heaven Temple.

Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch and the other Heavenly Monarchs were cultivating, and they suddenly sensed a supreme aura, and they suddenly woke up one after another.

"I've seen Shizun!"

All the Heavenly Monarchs looked at the supreme shadow in the void and bowed down one after another.

A wisp of consciousness of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was obviously intended to let the other disciples know, otherwise he would enter Ye Tian's retreat secret room silently, and no one would know.

But it was a big deal for the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor to accept his own disciples, and every time he held a grand event in the Void Heaven Realm.

However, now that Ye Tian is in the great universe, and he is a native creature of the universe, if he does not detach, even if he has a way to move Ye Tian out of the great universe, he will not dare to do so, otherwise Ye Tian's life will not be guaranteed.

Although it is not possible to hold a grand banquet for the disciples of the personal lineage, it is at least necessary to announce it, and hold a worship ceremony inside the Void Heaven Palace.

"Let all the disciples come back!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestral Dao.

"Yes!"

Peng Yu Tianjun responded.

Immediately, all the disciples of the Void Heaven Hall came out of the retreat room and came here.

And the disciples of the Void Heaven Hall who were in the outside world also rushed back to the Void Heaven Hall one by one, except for some disciples who were in a special secret realm and could not rush back, almost all the other disciples had arrived.

And Ye Tian naturally came out, he saw the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and he already understood what the reason was.

When many disciples were there, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor spoke: "Today, the deity is going to accept another disciple!"

"What, personal disciple?"

The disciples of the Void Heaven Hall were shocked.

Others may not know, but Peng Yu Tianjun knows very well how high his master's standard for accepting disciples is to pass on his own lineage.

In his opinion, no disciple could be lucky enough to become the personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor!

The strength of the Dark Light Heavenly Monarch is not weak, and his talent is also very good, his cultivation is not as good as him, but his strength is not much weaker than him, but the master of the Dark Light Heavenly Monarch is the disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

According to the generational words, it is impossible for the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor to accept the Dark Light Heavenly Monarch as a personal disciple, otherwise it will be out of order.

Therefore, the personal disciples accepted by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor this time could only be selected among those registered disciples or official disciples, and the greatest possibility was the official disciples.

But although there are not many formal disciples here, there are not many of them.

"Who is it?"

Peng Yu Tianjun and the other formal disciples speculated with each other.

Suddenly, Peng Yu Tianjun thought of Ye Tian, but immediately shook his head secretly.

Ye Tiandu has not made progress for tens of thousands of years, how can such a talent be qualified to become a personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and even some weaker juniors can't compare to it!

"Ye Tian, step forward!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor spoke again.

Ye Tian stepped forward, bent down and bowed, "Master!"

"Ye Tian, today I will accept you as a disciple for my teacher, because you are in the great universe and cannot organize a grand banquet, so now you can simply apprentice here!"

"Thank you, Master!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but be overjoyed.

Although he guessed that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor had come to accept him as a personal disciple because he had comprehended the Void Heaven Diagram, the guess was a guess, and it was not until this moment that he was completely determined, and he was not excited.

Subsequently, Ye Tian carried out the apprenticeship process one by one in accordance with the apprenticeship method of the Xutian lineage, and of course there are also rules that need to be set by the disciples to apprentice, such as not being able to deceive the teacher and destroy the ancestors.

Of course, these rules are just talk, and they can't really restrain a personal disciple, but if someone really dares to break these rules, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor will not condone it.

When the apprenticeship ended, many disciples of the Void Heaven Hall shouted, "Meet the Daozi!"

Daozi is the name of the Xutian Yimai to the disciple of the Xutian Dao Ancestor, even Pengyu Tianjun must call Ye Tian Daozi, and dare not call Ye Tian a junior brother anymore.

The only people who are really qualified to call Ye Tian a junior disciple are other personal disciples.

In order to celebrate the acceptance of a disciple by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor preached for one day.

This is also a great opportunity for other disciples.

A day later, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor took Ye Tian into a side hall.

--------

"How could this be, Ye Tian actually became Shizun's personal disciple???"

Many people in the Void Heaven Temple can't accept it, especially the god general of Ota who is also a god general.

In terms of strength, he is a mid-seven-star god general, and he is even about to enter the late seven-star stage, while Ye Tiancai is a six-star mid-stage god general.

Although he is not a disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, he has not been valued and cultivated by the Void Heaven Ancestor!

Eat one's heart out!

That's right, Ota God will be jealous!

But there was no way, he didn't dare to refute the decision of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

Peng Yu Tianjun and other official disciples were also very puzzled, and they didn't understand why Ye Tian had become the personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

There are many ways to become a disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and the Enlightenment Void Heaven Diagram is only one of them, so these formal disciples don't think of the Void Heaven Diagram at once.

Because there are too few Daozi who have really become pro-disciple because of the Void Heaven Diagram, most of them have become pro-disciple disciples through other means.

Because of this, no one thought of the Void Sky Map.

And soon, the news that a Daozi was born in the Void Heaven Temple also spread, causing a sensation in the entire universe.

Side hall.

Ye Tian was alone with the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor looked at Ye Tian and said with a smile: "Disciple, are you curious about the Void Heaven Diagram, what is the use of it, and why can you become a personal disciple after understanding it?"

"Yes, the disciple is very curious!"

Ye Tian admitted.
